generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance HVACSetpointActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator embedded in Building Control Systems (BCS) that executes HVAC setpoint adjustments generated by the Digital Twin based on real-time operational data and control policies."
]

instance LightLevelActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuator controlling building lighting systems, receiving commands from the Digital Twin to adjust illumination levels based on occupancy patterns and energy optimization policies."
]

instance AdaptiveLightingController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Smart controller implementing reinforcement learning-based adaptive lighting strategies (as demonstrated in BOREALIS project) for dynamic illumination adjustments."
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Embedded temperature sensor collecting real-time environmental data for building operational monitoring and control policy refinement."
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Post-occupancy sensor detecting building usage patterns to inform energy consumption optimization and adaptive control strategies."
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance LightSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Ambient light sensor providing real-time illumination data for dynamic lighting control and energy management."
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightDataTransmitted
]

instance EnergyConsumptionSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor monitoring building energy consumption metrics for operational analytics and predictive maintenance."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnergyDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance LightDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightSensor
]

instance EnergyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnergyConsumptionSensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance BIMCoreModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Semantic-rich 3D Building Information Model (BIM) representing building geometry, spatial relationships, and component properties in IFC or proprietary formats."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMEnrichmentTool, ModelValidationTool
]

instance RuntimeSemanticsLayer : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Extension layer embedding device metadata (sensor/actuator configurations) and middleware integration points (Hono/Ditto endpoints) onto the BIM core model."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ArtifactGenerationTool, EclipseHonoMiddleware
]

instance ControlPoliciesModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Declarative model defining adaptive control strategies including reinforcement learning-based policies for lighting optimization (BOREALIS project)."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance OperationalDataStore : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Structured repository storing real-time datasets including sensor telemetry, energy consumption logs, and operational metrics ingested via Eclipse Hono/Ditto."
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted, OccupancyDataTransmitted, LightDataTransmitted, EnergyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance VisualizationAssets : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 assets including 3D models, shaders, and UI elements for immersive monitoring and simulation of building operations."
    DTDFVocab:fromData BIMCoreModel, RuntimeSemanticsLayer
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RealTimeMonitoringService
]

// C11: Enablers
instance BIMEnrichmentTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Domain-specific modeling tool used by Building Control Engineers to extend BIM models with runtime semantics (device configurations, control logic)."
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelValidationService, ArtifactGenerationService
]

instance ModelValidationTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Automated validation system performing semantic consistency checks on enriched BIM models to ensure completeness and correctness."
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelValidationService
]

instance ArtifactGenerationTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) tool transforming enriched BIM models into deployable DT artifacts including middleware configurations and service interfaces."
    DTDFVocab:enables DeploymentService, RuntimeEvolutionService
]

instance EclipseHonoMiddleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono platform providing device connectivity and telemetry management for bidirectional communication between physical sensors/actuators and Digital Twin."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataIntegrationService
]

instance EclipseDittoMiddleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto platform enabling bidirectional state management and service integration between virtual and physical building systems."
    DTDFVocab:enables BidirectionalCommunicationService
]

instance UnrealEngineVisualization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 platform providing immersive 3D visualization, interactive monitoring, and simulation capabilities for building operations."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance ReinforcementLearningEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Machine learning framework implementing reinforcement learning algorithms for optimizing control policies (e.g., adaptive lighting) based on post-occupancy sensor data."
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

// C6: Services
instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous visualization and analysis of building operational data (energy consumption, environmental conditions) via Unreal Engine 5 for immersive 3D interaction."
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyConsumptionTrendInsight, OccupancyPatternInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integration of reinforcement learning to optimize control policies (e.g., adaptive lighting) based on post-occupancy sensor data and historical operational patterns."
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationRecommendation, EquipmentFailureAlert
]

instance DeploymentService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service responsible for deploying DT artifacts and configuring middleware endpoints for real-time data integration."
    DTDFVocab:provides DeploymentAction
]

instance RuntimeEvolutionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service managing dynamic evolution of DT services through runtime configuration management and policy updates."
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlLogicUpdateAction, AnalyticsRefinementAction
]

instance RealTimeDataIntegrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service handling real-time data synchronization between physical sensors and virtual models via middleware platforms."
    DTDFVocab:provides DataSynchronizationAction
]

instance BidirectionalCommunicationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling bidirectional communication between virtual and physical building systems through standardized interfaces."
    DTDFVocab:provides InterfaceGenerationAction
]

instance ModelValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service performing automated validation of enriched BIM models to ensure semantic consistency and completeness."
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationReportAction
]

instance ArtifactGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service transforming enriched BIM models into deployable DT artifacts through model-driven engineering techniques."
    DTDFVocab:provides ArtifactGenerationAction
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance EnergyConsumptionTrendInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time dashboard providing energy consumption trends for facility managers to monitor building operational efficiency."
]

instance OccupancyPatternInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization of occupancy patterns enabling optimized space utilization and energy management strategies."
]

instance EquipmentFailureAlert : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive maintenance alerts identifying potential equipment failures or performance degradation based on sensor data anomalies."
]

instance EnergyOptimizationRecommendation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Suggestions for energy-efficient adjustments (e.g., HVAC setpoints, lighting schedules) derived from reinforcement learning models."
]

instance StakeholderCollaborationInterface : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Shared DT interfaces enabling cross-disciplinary decision-making through interactive 3D models for architects, engineers, and facility managers."
]

instance DeploymentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Deployment of DT artifacts and configuration of middleware endpoints for real-time data integration."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ControlLogicUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dynamic adjustment of control policies (e.g., adaptive lighting) based on post-occupancy feedback to improve long-term operational efficiency."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AnalyticsRefinementAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Refinement of analytics models based on new data patterns and operational requirements."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DataSynchronizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Synchronization of real-time data between physical sensors and virtual models."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance InterfaceGenerationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generation of bidirectional communication interfaces between virtual and physical systems."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ValidationReportAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generation of validation reports for enriched BIM models."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ArtifactGenerationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Transformation of enriched BIM models into deployable DT artifacts."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C12: Environments/Components
instance BuildingControlSystemEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains HVACSetpointActuator, LightLevelActuator, TemperatureSensor, OccupancySensor
]

instance DigitalTwinRuntimeEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains RuntimeSemanticsLayer, OperationalDataStore, EclipseHonoMiddleware, EclipseDittoMiddleware
]

instance VisualizationEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains UnrealEngineVisualization, VisualizationAssets
]

instance ControlPolicyEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains ControlPoliciesModel, ReinforcementLearningEngine
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Virtual-to-physical interaction occurs via **control signals** generated by the DT and transmitted back to physical actuators (e.g., lighting systems, HVAC units) through the middleware layer (**Eclipse Hono/Ditto**). The framework supports **bidirectional communication** by generating runtime interfaces from BIM models, enabling the DT to execute control logic (e.g., adaptive lighting policies) and adjust physical systems in real-time. This interaction is orchestrated through **standardized extension points**, allowing seamless integration of custom services and automated deployment of control commands."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time scale is **real-time**, with continuous synchronization between the physical and virtual systems. While specific time rates (e.g., milliseconds for lighting, seconds/minutes for HVAC) are not explicitly detailed in the documents, the framework emphasizes **low-latency data exchange** via Eclipse Hono and Ditto to ensure near-instantaneous updates. The **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric** is used to evaluate the fidelity of this synchronization over time, ensuring the DT remains aligned with the physical asset's operational state."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is orchestrated as a **service-oriented architecture** with the following components:
   - **Core DT Hub**: Centralized platform integrating BIM models, runtime data, and control logic, acting as the **unified interface** for stakeholders (e.g., facility managers, engineers).
   - **Middleware Layer**: **Eclipse Hono/Ditto** enabling **real-time bidirectional communication** between PT and DT, including device management, telemetry ingestion, and command execution.
   - **Visualization Layer**: **Unreal Engine 5** providing an interactive 3D environment for monitoring, simulation, and user interaction.
   - **Service Layer**: Modular services (e.g., predictive analytics, adaptive control) deployed as **microservices** with standardized interfaces, allowing dynamic extension.
   - **Data Layer**: Structured storage for BIM models, operational data, and control policies, ensuring scalability and interoperability.
   The constellation is designed for **scalability** across building infrastructures and supports **decentralized twinning** through hierarchical or modular deployments."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT spans **multiple lifecycle stages**, including:
    - **Design phase**: BIM models are enriched with device and control logic configurations.
    - **Construction phase**: Physical sensors and actuators are deployed and integrated.
    - **Operation phase**: Real-time monitoring, control, and optimization occur.
    - **Refurbishment/Adaptation phase**: The DT evolves with updates to physical infrastructure or operational requirements.
    The DT represents the building **as designed (ideal)**, **as manufactured**, and **as operated**, with continuous synchronization to reflect real-world conditions."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
   - **Semantic Alignment**: The DT’s representation is grounded in **BIM’s comprehensive semantics**, including geometric, spatial, and functional data, with runtime extensions for operational aspects.
   - **Real-Time Synchronization**: **Eclipse Hono/Ditto** middleware validates and synchronizes data streams between PT and DT, reducing **semantic drift** (as discussed in Abbasi et al.).
   - **Validation Metrics**: The **Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE)** metric quantifies the DT’s accuracy in reflecting the PT’s state, with thresholds defined for operational fidelity.
   - **Uncertainty Modeling**: The framework accounts for **data gaps** (e.g., missing sensor readings) and **model inaccuracies** (e.g., deviations in as-built vs. as-designed) through probabilistic or heuristic corrections.
   - **Verification**: Automated checks validate the correctness of generated DT artifacts (e.g., middleware configurations, visualization assets) before deployment."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT technical connection relies on **Eclipse Hono and Ditto middleware** for real-time data exchange, but specific network protocols (e.g., MQTT, RESTful) are not detailed in the provided documents. The middleware facilitates bidirectional communication between physical sensors/actuators and the DT, ensuring low-latency synchronization. Security considerations (e.g., encrypted connections) are implied but not explicitly described."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is deployed as a **scalable framework** with no explicit details on cloud/on-premise infrastructure, containerization (e.g., Docker), or deployment architectures. The focus is on **modular service integration** and **runtime adaptability**, enabling deployment across heterogeneous environments. The framework abstracts away infrastructure concerns, prioritizing interoperability and extensibility over specific hosting details."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The framework supports **interoperability across heterogeneous systems**, enabling integration with external platforms (e.g., facility management software, ERP systems) through standardized middleware interfaces (Eclipse Hono/Ditto). However, specific integrations (e.g., city-wide digital twin ecosystems) are not detailed in the provided documents. The modular architecture facilitates seamless communication with external systems via well-defined extension points."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT framework adheres to **BIM standards** and leverages open-source middleware (**Eclipse Ditto/Hono**) for interoperability. While specific standards like **IFC (Industry Foundation Classes)** or **OPC UA** are not explicitly mentioned, the use of BIM as the semantic backbone implies compliance with AECO-specific modeling conventions. The framework prioritizes **standardized extension points** to ensure compatibility with industry tools and protocols."
]
